example: Columbus discovered America.
The car industry is growing.
Air pollution is a serious problem.
We must protect endangered animals.
What is the purpose of this meeting?
mnemonic: pur(위해) + pose(놓다). 무엇을 위해 놓은 것이 목적.

example: She speaks with confidence.
Music has a big influence on people.
This job requires experience.
The car is in good condition.
mnemonic: con(함께) + dition(말하다). 함께 정한 것이 조건.

example: The company supplies food to schools.
There is a high demand for smartphones.
mnemonic: de(완전히) + mand(명령). 완전히 명령하면 강한 요구.

example: Let's discuss the problem together.
Please consider my suggestion.
mnemonic: con(함께) + sider(별). 별을 함께 보며 깊이 생각.

example: We should reduce waste.
mnemonic: re(뒤로) + duce(이끌다). 뒤로 이끌면 줄이는 것.

example: Nothing is impossible.
What material is this made of?
We are in a difficult situation.
mnemonic: situ(위치) + ation. 어떤 위치에 있는 것이 상황.

example: It's your responsibility to clean up.
She accepted my apology.
He achieved his dream.
mnemonic: a + chief(주요한). 주요한 것을 이루면 달성!

example: My parents allow me to stay up late.
A rainbow appeared in the sky.
The cat slowly approached the bird.
I try to avoid junk food.
mnemonic: a(~에서) + void(빈). 빈 곳으로 가면 피하기!

example: This book belongs to me.
mnemonic: be + long(긴). 오래 있으면 그곳에 속하게 돼요.
